english_text: I'm in love with the shape of you
You can't stop me loving myself
korean_text: 나를 사랑하는 걸 멈출 수 없어
romanization: nareul saranghaneun geol meomchul su eopseo

english_text: Even if I fall I'll rise again
I'm the one I should love
It's okay to not be okay
Life goes on no matter what
Even in the dark I found light
Don't be trapped in someone's dream
I'll always be here for you
I want to be your comfort
Life is tough but so am I
We got the best of us
